_comment: DJR Photography galleries. Each gallery links a Photo Gallery App album (albums.html / album.html, Supabase) to a category so it can be filtered. Get an album's ID from its URL: album.html?album=<ID>. Edit via Decap CMS → DJR Photography → Galleries.

meta.title: Galleries | DJR Photography
meta.description: Browse DJR Photography galleries — landscape, portrait, wedding, sports, event, and aerial photography.

hero.title: Galleries
hero.intro: Browse my latest work by category. Each gallery opens in the full photo album viewer with lightbox, slideshows, and downloads.
